definition: A round fruit with red or green skin
sentence: She picked a ripe apple from the tree.

definition: Ready to face danger or pain
sentence: The brave firefighter rushed into the burning building.

definition: A small wooden shelter or house
sentence: They spent the weekend in a cozy cabin by the lake.
The children love to dance at birthday parties.
The bald eagle soared high above the canyon.

definition: A hot glowing body of ignited gas
sentence: A single flame flickered atop the birthday candle.

definition: A berry growing in clusters on a vine
sentence: She plucked a grape from the vine and ate it.

definition: A sweet substance made by bees
sentence: He drizzled honey over his morning toast.

definition: A representation of the form of a person or thing
sentence: The image on the screen was perfectly clear.
The queen's crown was encrusted with every kind of jewel.

definition: Strike a surface to attract attention
sentence: Please knock before you enter the room.
She squeezed a fresh lemon into her glass of water.
The music from the concert could be heard down the street.
It was a noble gesture to donate his winnings to charity.

definition: A very large expanse of sea
sentence: The vast ocean stretched out to the horizon.

definition: Belonging to the very distant past
sentence: The ancient ruins told the story of a forgotten civilization.
She found a real bargain at the antique shop.
The captain steered the ship through the narrow channel.
A playful dolphin leaped out of the water beside the boat.

definition: An obscuring of light from a celestial body
sentence: The solar eclipse darkened the sky for several minutes.

definition: The faculty of imagining impossible things
sentence: The novel was set in a world of pure fantasy.

definition: Truly what something is said to be
sentence: The appraiser confirmed the painting was genuine.
The farmers celebrated a bountiful harvest this autumn.

definition: Form a mental image of something
sentence: Can you imagine what life was like a thousand years ago?

definition: The quality of being fair and reasonable
sentence: The judge was known for delivering justice with compassion.

definition: A room where food is prepared
sentence: The aroma of fresh bread filled the entire kitchen.

definition: A lamp with a transparent case
sentence: He carried a lantern to light the path through the woods.
The disappearance of the artifact remained a mystery.

definition: The central part of an atom
sentence: The nucleus contains protons and neutrons.

definition: A view or judgment not based on fact
sentence: Everyone is entitled to their own opinion on the matter.

definition: A very large quantity of something
sentence: The garden produced an abundance of tomatoes this year.

definition: Pleasing the senses or mind aesthetically
sentence: The sunset painted a beautiful picture across the sky.
The library published a new catalogue of its rare books.
The magician made the rabbit disappear from the hat.
The architect created an elaborate design for the new museum.
Swimming was forbidden in the reservoir.
The manufacturer offers a five-year guarantee on all products.

definition: Pause before saying or doing something
sentence: She did not hesitate to volunteer for the difficult assignment.

definition: Treat with a vaccine to produce immunity
sentence: The doctor planned to inoculate all the children before winter.
Her knowledge of history impressed the entire class.

definition: The action or sound of laughing
sentence: The comedian's jokes filled the room with laughter.
The pilot executed a difficult maneuver to avoid the storm.

definition: A spoken or written account of events
sentence: The author wove a compelling narrative about life in the 1920s.
The orchestra performed Beethoven's Fifth Symphony.
It is a privilege to attend such a prestigious university.
The hotel can accommodate up to three hundred guests.
The revolution was largely driven by the rising bourgeoisie.

definition: A garden plant of the daisy family
sentence: She planted a row of chrysanthemum along the garden fence.
Without proper maintenance, the building began to deteriorate.

definition: A person who sets up a business
sentence: The young entrepreneur launched three startups before turning thirty.
The fluorescent lights hummed softly in the empty office.

definition: An escape of blood from a ruptured vessel
sentence: The surgeon worked quickly to stop the hemorrhage.
One of his many idiosyncrasy was arranging books by color.
The juxtaposition of old and new architecture made the street unique.
The festival was a kaleidoscope of color, sound, and motion.

definition: A complicated irregular network of passages
sentence: The ancient labyrinth beneath the palace had never been fully mapped.
A sense of melancholy settled over the town after the factory closed.
He gave a nonchalant shrug as if the news didn't bother him at all.

definition: Formation of a word from a sound
sentence: Words like 'buzz' and 'hiss' are examples of onomatopoeia.
The parliament voted to approve the new education reform.
After much debate, the committee decided to acquiesce to the demands.

definition: Wishing to do what is right
sentence: She was a conscientious student who always completed her assignments on time.
Vaccination has dramatically reduced the incidence of diphtheria worldwide.
The ecclesiastical court had jurisdiction over matters of church law.

definition: A frivolous or excessively talkative person
sentence: Her grandmother called her a flibbertigibbet whenever she gossiped too much.
The gubernatorial race attracted national attention.
The teacher used a heuristic approach to help students learn through experimentation.
The team suffered an ignominious defeat in the championship finals.

definition: Tending to talk a great deal
sentence: The loquacious host kept the dinner party entertained all evening.
She used a mnemonic to remember the order of the planets.

definition: A specialized root that grows upward for gas exchange
sentence: The mangrove's pneumatophore extended above the waterline to absorb oxygen.

definition: Obedient or attentive to an excessive degree
sentence: The obsequious waiter hovered over the table, refilling glasses after every sip.

definition: Having a ready insight into things
sentence: The perspicacious detective noticed the one clue everyone else had overlooked.
The querulous customer returned to the store for the third time that week.
The professor's sesquipedalian vocabulary often left his students reaching for a dictionary.
